page: Microsoft Azure DC48eds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the DCEDV5 server family. Powered by an Intel x86_64 processor, this server provides 48 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 192.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

For local data requirements, the instance includes 1441 GB of bundled local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance external disk options. The server does not include any graphics processing units (GPUs), making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated rendering or GPU-bound machine learning tasks.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the DC48eds_v5 offers a high-density allocation of dedicated compute and memory resources suitable for enterprise workloads. The combination of 48 dedicated vCPUs, substantial local storage, and Premium Storage capability makes this server type appropriate for memory-intensive applications, database hosting, enterprise-grade web serving, and data processing workloads that do not require GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure DC48eds_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the DCEDV5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 192.0 GB of system memory, establishing a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance is equipped with 1441 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations for demanding input and output requirements. It does not contain any GPU hardware accelerators. Designed for resource-intensive enterprise applications, the DC48eds_v5 provides a balanced, high-density hardware profile. This configuration is highly suitable for database management systems, large-scale data processing, enterprise web applications, and memory-intensive workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and fast local storage without the need for graphics acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC48eds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 192.0 GB of RAM, and 1441 GB of local storage, designed for enterprise database and data workloads.

tagline: A dedicated forty-eight core virtual machine featuring one hundred ninety-two gigabytes of memory and substantial local storage for enterprise workloads.
